CustomField.description: ary: Feld zur Übergabe auf das Abacus Mahnformular
CustomField.formula:
IF( AND( ISBLANK( CustomerReference__c ), ISBLANK( CustomerOrderNr__c ) ) ,"",
IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK( CustomerReference__c )), NOT(ISBLANK( CustomerOrderNr__c )) ) ,LEFT("Ihre Ref: "&CustomerReference__c &" / PO-Nr.: "&CustomerOrderNr__c,60),
IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK( CustomerReference__c )), ISBLANK( CustomerOrderNr__c ) ) ,LEFT("Ihre Ref: "&CustomerReference__c,60),
LEFT("PO-Nr.: "& CustomerOrderNr__c,60) )))
CustomField.label: Abacus Belegreferenz
